reviews.review_title: How to buy a new mower
reviews.review_description: Like where do I buy a new mower at

Right, so like a couple of months in it’s really fun but after those couple of months guess what? Number one you can’t jump jump out the vehicle seat so the whole entire game is ruined and I can’t do stuff. It’s a whole entire waste of time all I could do is just stand there that’s it. It’s not a glitch. It’s a bug that they need to fix. Do not get and if you’re reading this and you got it, refund it and also I can refund that as well cause it’s been a couple of months in do not get waste of money that’s all the money I saved up for gone fix your game seriously
I have a lawn mowing business

I played the game for 30-40 minutes definitely not 2 hours and I can’t refund it I spent 20€ for a game where u look forward and go and it goes left u cant steer it keeps spinning out so I really dont recommend it.

For saying this game sucks and the controllers are not good. They’re just not good at games but this is a fabulous game and it’s I really like it and it’s a long story mode and keep putting updates into this game.￼

If I wasn’t looking in certain direction the controls either pushed me toward a wall or were just inverted this doesn’t make any sense and I could even walk using my right hand because I’m right handed good idea needs some work though fix some issues and make it more inviting and make it multi player
Plenty of instruction is given to sharpen.And change the blade and to mow the lawn but there is no instruction on how to change the battery or even how to open the battery compartment

He is very fun just can’t get past the tutorial. That’s the only part I don’t like about it. 
￼

For me the games can overwhelm me with the press here and start this but only when... I just want to mow lawns and enjoy the scenery. I find the controls so frustrating to get the mower to start and then getting it to cut the lawn. It also requires continuous engagement with the left of right trigger for power. It could be simpler and straight forward as it is not a lesson but a lazy game to kind of drift off. Just simplify and don't have so many awkward controls.

Excellent version for the standalone. Really immersive with lots of interactions and some satisfying use of haptics.
 The game has you maintaining your lawn mowers and trimmers. Sharpen your blades on the grinder and you get lovely sparks and some great grindy haptics. You also have to charge the batteries of your equipment. All this is done manually removing them from the machinery.
The game has a plethora of options. Full loco and smooth turn , teleport and click turn, grab or grab toggle, Height adjustment for you and your bag for objects you pick up on the lawns. Hybrid controls so you can go all out with the hands on the wheel or sit back and use analog stick on the fly.
The visuals surprised me. I knew they had turned them cartoony for the Quest version compared to the more realistic looking flat version, what I wasn't prepared for is how good these look in some of the locations with great lighting. It really did feel like a lazy late sunny afternoon mowing outside a thatched cottage in the English countryside especially as the ambient sounds are done so well. You will hear the odd car drive past, a dog barking or siren in the far distance, church bells, insects and birds. Playing the game outside in the back garden is sublime and adds to the atmosphere. Half the time I couldn't tell what was the real audio or the game audio it was that good.
I can tell some real love has been put into this game with all the little touches. If you have played a forklift VR game you will be fine with this one is my guess as it the same sort of movement of mower. The trimmer is also very immersive to use with nice haptics.
Please devs bring the game to PSVR2 with wheel support to go along with the great motion controls and analog controls and I am sure it will be well appreciated over there. I will double dip.
This game goes up there with MudRunner VR, Golf5 and The Climb 2 as some of my most Immersive games on Quest. I ran the batteries down on my Mower, Trimmer and my Quest.
This game was overall just not fun and I don’t get motion sickness but this game did it for me and very glitchy and would only let me do one mission

Excellent game but I have to agree with people on here, don't play if you suffer from motion sickness. I don't normally suffer with it but after playing this I started feeling very sick to the point t had to run to bathroom. If it weren't for the motion, I would give it 5 stars. Thank you for the game anyway.

I think I like this game but I can’t ever play it long enough to know for sure. I don’t usually suffer from motion sickness in the car, on the boat or in the Metaverse but this game makes be very nauseous almost immediately

reviews.review_title: Not good to play if you have motion sick
reviews.review_description: When I play this game I start to feel sick and nauseous and also dizzy
Thought it would be good but it's buggy and feels unofficial

Motion sickness, misleading information, doesn’t work properly, poor directions, the joysticks are misdirected and change every time you touch them, you have to build but also can’t build your lawn mower, 2 lawn mower options one is paid and the one that’s not paid doesn’t work. Just no please no.
The motion, sickness of this game is insane and I spent some time playing it hoping I can get used to it and I guess I went over two hours so I can’t refund it to get my money back.

UPDATE 3/30/25=   This p.o.s. game, after ALL of this time, is REFUSING to let me get past the first maintenance and load up tutorial! Once I get the mower on the lift, I can't get back on to the d@mn thing! NO MATTER WHAT I DO!! I can't even open the battery compartment once it's on the lift! 
HOW TF is such a core component of the game THIS F#*&#$G BROKEN?! My god, I've had this game for at least a year, and it seems completely dropped by the devs and is a COMPLETE waste of my hard earned f&ff#&g money!!
I swear to god, if you haven't purchased and wasted your money on this p.o.s, PLEASE don't buy it like the rest of us poor sobs who did.
I want to stand with VR and its developers, but this sh*t is unacceptable...



OG=  The game seems like it could be fun enough in that casual VR "job simulator" type of way (ok graphics, good controls, nice gameplay loop mechanics, etc.), but going by many reviews there are plenty of bugs to be had and the developers seem to have given up on spending time updating the game overall.
My bad first impression in noticing it's possibly buggy nature wasJUST as soon as I went back to the garage after the tutorial for your very first drive of the lawn mower.
I get back to the garage, put the mower on the lift, and get up to see instructions to "open mower battery compartment"... ok? For one, it never says how or where that is on this mower, and even when I did find it (my hand randomly had a green pointer light connecting to it when I pointed in it's direction all of a sudden, even though it didn't in the full 5-7 minutes prior...). This didn't matter though, as NOTHING I did would let me interact with the battery door. I tried to raise the lift to see if maybe that was the issue, but alas, MY HANDS WOULD ONLY GO THROUGH THE LIFT'S BUTTONS) Which obviously makes that useless...
So I restarted the game (completely, as reloading the save just had the EXACT same issues..) and I got to this point again, but this time it was a completely different task for whatever reason. Now all I had to do was check my PC and load up the truck for my first contract. But the lift was STILL uninteractable, with my hands going through the buttons ss if it hasn't there at all (my god that better not keep happening..). 🙄
Outside of those oddities (bugs?), the only other smaller issue I've had with the game thus far is being unable to really play while sitting UNLESS you are sitting in an armless chair or one you can easily reach down the sides of while not having to put your arms out toobfar from your body, because sitting in ANYTHING or anywhere else (no big recliners, couches, beds, or the floor or anything even too close to the floor) makes it impossible to reach the blade drop lever on your left or either of the buttons on the right unless you stand up and re-center. EVEN in the default "SEATED" mode.. 
Not game breaking per se, but still an unnecessary limiting factor and huge annoyance.

I'm giving the game ONE more chance, seeing if I can get through the first contract without any more oddities, as it's too much money to waste on a just barely functioning game. Will update my review depending on this final (?) outing's outcome.

reviews.review_title: This app is full of bugs
reviews.review_description: This app is full of bugs I have removed the battery for the strimmer/weedwaker, charged it and put it back in the strimmer/weedwacker at least 10 times. Same with the lawnmower and can't do anything without doing these activities first

I was really excited for this game thinking it would be like power wash sim but this was tedious.  Had to exit the game a couple of times because the lift kept saying there was something below it.  Finally got all the tedious tutorials done and started mowing....two minutes in complete motion sickness.  I was sick for a good 30 minutes.   Never had motion sickness before.  I can fly, climb heights, and go above and below water but mowing the grass.  🤮🤢🤢. Bummer

I got the game in the sale because reviews were getting better.  Yeah, no. Had to restart the game 6 times before I was the correct height and not the size of Shaq.  Then I would grab for something and it acted as if I hadn't tried to grab it.  Then when it came time to open the battery box on the mower neither grabbing the grab spot or pointing and hitting A worked even after rebooting the game another 3 times.  Fix this, then I will update my review once your game isn't in paid Alpha.  Update:  Now I started a whole new save and can't even get on the mower when it comes time to load on the trailer.  This is the biggest piece of crap game.  I loved it on Xbox, but on Quest as VR, horribly implemented.

Took a punt on this, despite the average reviews. Wow glad I did! Looks better than I expected and the graphics are great! Yes there’s not a massive amount of depth to the game but that’s not the point, it’s a unique,dip in and out, relaxing type of game is well worth the low price point.

I do get motion sickness very quickly now. 

I think the only thing that I would like to see is; you have to be very precise where you have to grab to interact with different objects, maybe make it easier. Also the grass doesn't look cutted, it changes to a dark green. Idk maybe something else, I'm not sure if you can implicate something else. 

Lastly I love how the game is more micromanagement, then on PC. Sharpening the blades, recharging the batteries I think that’s all great. I'd like to see more additions and updates to the game. I can't wait. 🙂
The movement is bad so it’s kinda unplayable forward doesn’t go forward it’s not my joystick and setting the joystick angle doesn’t help

reviews.review_title: Honestly not as bad as the revs state
reviews.review_description:
Ima be honest all these reviews talking about bugs and lag is honestly not applying to my gameplay, I have a quest 2 and 3 but have to use 2 at the moment, this game is honestly really fun and the only bug I’ve saw is falling through the map trying to get out the mower which only happened once, people talking about the motion sickness isn’t completely lying, about 20 minutes  in I did start feeling a little uneasy but i could settle with it, I’ve never been a vignette guy so I’ll just deal with it, 

The games graphics aren’t that bad same with the audio. The controls are really good except holding the wheel for to long will make it very sensitive and you’ll just cling to a different direction but you can just take your hands off and put them back on it’s all good, 

I also had to use the weed wacker on a majority of it being that it’s really hard to cut grass like anywhere closer that 2 feet from a wall, bush, etc. 

In conclusion this game is really fun with honestly little bugs and very little lag, if you don’t want to use vignette then just take nausea pills or something before t LOL, anyways, I love it and expect several hours on this game!

reviews.review_title: Bug in game has me stuck on level
reviews.review_description: I am stuck in the level Delaney Lodge Outlook. I am 100% finished with cut and weed wacking but the mower is parked by the trailer with the batteries on the ground. I cannot insert them back inside no matter how hard I try. This prevents me from driving the mower back onto the trailer and completing the level. I've downloaded the update, re-did the level (twice), turned the game off and on....Idk what else to do. I don't want to uninstall and lose progress. At this point I am stuck. Can the developers contact me on how to fix this? If the issue gets fixed I will gladly change my review rating as I enjoy the game a lot. Thank you!
I don’t know why this game is 3 stars it should be like 4.5, it’s an amazing game. NO motion sickness at all idk what people are talking about.
First I kept falling through the world and then when it finally worked, I got so motion sick in seconds.  I thought the new update would help, but it did not.
Like omg how do I buy a new lawn mower and fix all the bugs in the game I’m going to refund this game plz someone help me buy a new lawnmower

ok it pretty good but the the black ness around your screen when you get on the lawnmower and start moving  gives you a lot of motion sickness and there’s a couple bugs and maybe if the game can fix the moving that would make it a lot better

reviews.review_title: For those that are stuck on tutorial
reviews.review_description: For you to move on you need to set the height of the blades with the lever thing to 7 inches. If you don’t do 7 inches or more the game will not continue. I had to watch a YouTube vid of someone playing through the tutorial to figure this out as I was stuck on tutorial but not anymore. Hope this helps!
So dumb can’t save no matter what way to many glitches can’t even play it and you get stop when your not even near a wall it’s only good to take up time that’s it
This game is bad because you have to build the lawnmower

I'm giving it a 3 star rating for now, I could have justified a 2 star. I had a game breaking progress bug in the tutorial that forced me to start a new save. The 2nd time was a charm and I completed the tutorial. 

Here's the thing that honestly makes me wanna rate this a 2. The overly huge info panel parked right in my mowing line. Who thought this was a good UI design? I can't even fathom how that made it in the final release build. I will up my review to 4 stars if you remove that immersion breaking UI element.

I LOVE this game don’t get me wrong but I feel like right now it is slacking off on mowers and trimmers. The other game has so many mowers like scag and toro so why can’t thing game have that? Devs if u can respond I’m wondering if there will be more? Or is this just it. Thank you for this gem tho!

Doesn't Live Up to Expectations

Still quite buggy and lacking quality of life features that should have been in the game initially even after the first update, they still aren't there.

Missing a lot of QOL features that would make it more playable. Like the ability to remove the massive progress par from the middle of the screen. It just really takes away the immersion of the game, and really doesn't allow for good content creation with it just covering way too much of the screen real estate, and it's just annoying. 

The circle hitboxes to grab items are far too small, you have to be exactly in the right position at the center of the circle, and even then it doesn't even register that you're trying to pick something up.  

The controls are wonky, and the steering will randomly jerk the mower into a pot or obstacle you've been really trying hard to not hit and break

The mowers also destroy items from about 10cm away. I've sat there watching the mower try and pass objects with 10cm clearance just to watch the items break 10cm away...

Also please consider adding those youtube music channels in so you can have some good music to listen to while mowing. (The ones a lot of other games have)

The one thing I can say, is that I did not experience any sort of motion sickenss at all. Now, or even before the update.

The gameplay is fun however, the maintenance, and tasks you need to do before mowing is pretty cool. Having to sharpen your mower blades, repair your mower, charge batteries, refill your fuel tanks. This all adds to the game. But it's just let down by the issues mentioned above. 

Fix those, and the game would be a solid 4/5 stars for me instead of the current 3/5

reviews.review_title: Great Simulator. No motion sickness here
reviews.review_description:
Tutorial is easy. Just look at your watch and follow the obvious arrows. With the lawn mower blade, it has two blades on it so grind them both. I'm honestly confused how people are finding it hard but whatever. 

No motion sickness here. I've played worse like the mini car racing game. I'm finding this game enjoyable and relaxing. I certainly wouldn't play it for hours at a time though. 

If anything is tedious, it's grabbing the items in the grass. I'm certain I have to leave my mower and it would be better if I could collect them while seated. Maybe just have a button grab it and put it in the bag. 

Looking forward to updates. Real shame this game has the rating it has. I hope you developers recover from it.

developer_response.body:
Hi Capt. Quint!

We're glad you had a great time playing Lawn Mowing Simulator VR. Your kind words mean a lot, and we've logged all of your feedback. 

I look forward to sharing future updates with you!

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description:
I pre-ordered this game. I was excited about it.  It is buggy but it was just released. So hoping they do some updates.  I am also hoping they add a Zen mode where you can just do contacts and mow.  The waiting for batteries to charge..the loading the mower for every job is a pain.  But this is a simulator...so guess it's my bad hoping for a power washer experience.  Took a while to get the controls down...once you are mowing it really is fun and relaxing. It's just the getting there that's a pain. I will keep the game in hopes of some updates will make it better.

EDIT...First update and is already better.  Like the fact that you can move faster and you can tell what needs to be cut much better by sight. Keep up the good work developers. Thanks for caring about the gamers!! ☺️ (Adding a star)

reviews.review_title: Make the game have more depth
reviews.review_description:
It's very glitchy I can't even lie it's kinda sad how little effort this game had put into it,
I'm a real life landscaper and this game SUCKS!! in comparison to irl I want to be able to drive to my job sites and I wanna be able to buy my own equipment, and no electric equipment not to mention that the real equipment is WAY FASTER!!!
honestly I've tried to return the game but you guys suck so I couldn't return it cause I played it for 1½hrs in hope that it would get better but nope. Please make it more like farming simulator I can guarantee that you would have 100s of thousands of sales if you made farming simulator vr
I don't get why people are writing a bad review on this game I really enjoy it, I can't wait to see where this game goes, it's fun getting things ready for a job, and the joy of finishing a job.
I honestly love the game and concept only thing is i wish there was more mowers but I don’t know why everyone’s hating on it
I am trying to move on to my next job and I can't get on the mower as no way of getting on like I am supposed to do so can't move any further.

reviews.review_title: Need a little bit more work into it
reviews.review_description: Well, I didn’t know if you have to go left to go forward. Oh also, I did not know you have two wheels on the steering wheel at all cost not even trying to start the mower one star

This is such an incredible simulation! Trimming grass and flowers is fun in VR.

There's nothing else to say other than if you like mowing lawns, this game is for you!

developer_response.body:
Hi PixelMiiVR,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review! We really appreciate all of your support :)

Make sure to follow Skyhook and Curve Games on social for future Lawn Mowing Simulator VR updates!

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description: If I wouldn’t have waited too long I’d have requested a refund. Trailer much better than actual gameplay. I’d personally not buy if I had it to do all over

👍

if you get motion sick, skill issue



alsooo whenever I get off my mower sometimes I get put under the map
If you have bad motion sickness this game is not for you I get motion sickness very easily
It will not even let me get a new lawn mower
Not on Steam and not supported on any Platform

I played all of 10 mins and I’m super disappointed. The controls are really wonky and hard to do anything let alone mow. The motion sickness you get when mowing is unbearable. I was really looking forward to this game but I can absolutely not play at all.

I spent an hour and a half trying to get through the tutorial. It says Cut 10% of the grass but when I'm cutting the grass nothing's happening I mean it's cutting but it's not detecting that it's cutting. I can't get past the tutorial. And I also had issues Getting the lawn mower to come down I had to restart the game pushing the buttons on the lawn mower are buggy. Here's the issues I have the steering and the centering when you're on the lawn mower When you try to get on the lawn mower it puts you right on the other side of it even though you centered the game you have to center it again and it takes you out of the game these bugs are just so obvious that you have to be a stupid programmer not to see it. It's like oh wow we made this game it looks awesome let's put it out and see if it works.

After trying Power Wash Simulator and falling in love with "relaxing chore" games, I couldn't wait to try this game. Within 10 minutes I was dizzy and ready to vomit. I've never had motion sickness in my entire life, but this game gave it to me halfway through the first mission. 

I've played all intense games in VR...flying games, climbing games, high movement games....and have conquered them all. But the lawn mowing game got the best of me. 

Overall a great idea, but something absolutely needs to be done about the motion sickness. Will consider repurchasing in the future if there is an update.

developer_response.body:
Hi Bernard,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We're really sorry to hear that you experienced motion sickness while playing our game.

We've just pushed an update live with several additional comfort settings, you're now able to select from a variety of different vignette options and disable grass sway. We’ve also improved our centre dot feature. Together, these should work to improve the experience of those encountering motion sickness. 

If you get a chance to try these options out, we'd love to hear your thoughts.

You can read more about the update in our blog post:
https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/335328362384637/

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description: Didn’t try out but look’s awesome.  I’ll edit my review after I give it a shot.   I can’t figure out how to change the batteries?? I found the chargers and I see where they go in but I can’t get them out.

developer_response.body:
Hi Stockboy,

I hope you had a great evening, we're looking forward to hearing your thoughts!

-Bradley

reviews.review_description: I waited ages for this, really disappointed, I just wanted to mow the bloody lawn, not try and sharpen the blades which was impossible, trying to fix the the blade under the mower ,which again was impossible, didn't even get started. Is there any way to skip all of that so I can't JUST MOW THE LAWN

developer_response.body:
Hi Jaffacake,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and share your feedback with us. I'm really sorry that we haven't met your expectations with Lawn Mowing Simulator VR. It's a bit of a different experience from our previous title - which had more of a focus on managing the business side of a professional lawn mowing business. 

This time, we wanted to really highlight the physicality of lawn mowing, and getting up close and personal with your lawn mower - but I recognise that this isn't the experience that you were hoping for.

At present, there isn't a way to skip the garage sequence of the gameplay loop - but I will be passing your feedback along to the team :)

Thank you once again for the review!

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description: Hi! Looking through the reviews, it’s very bad, and I can agree (kinda). This game does have it’s ups and downs when it comes to experience and gameplay. However, take into consideration that even though it had a few months before release, it is still a new game and will be getting updates in the future just like any other game. Be patient.
Really excited for this game, but the first mission made me so motion sick I nearly puked. Tried vignette option and didn’t help. Really disappointed, and hope they fix this ASAP.

developer_response.body:
Hi Pitotn00b,

Firstly, thank you for the review, but more importantly I'm really sorry to hear you experienced motion sickness while playing our game. That's not an experience we want anyone to have, although we're aware that the "moderate" comfort rating we received from Meta means that while our game is appropriate for many people, some players may still experience motion sickness. 

I know that the team is currently looking at expanding vignette options, allowing players to manually increase/decrease the amount of vignetting, which might improve your experience moving forward.

I've made a note, and I just want to thank you once again for your feedback.

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description: I waited for months for this and it’s crap! It never works right. I hate it! It make me motion sick for two days straight! I tried to work through it but had to quit! Terrible game. So dissappointed! I wish so many things were different on this game. The idea is great but the execution is crap! Want my money back!

developer_response.body:
Hi DoodleMom,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, and I'm sorry you didn't have the experience that you had been anticipating.

The team is currently hard at work on improvements to several things, including expanding the vignette setting,   and some additional graphical changes that will look to reduce motion sickness.

We'll have more information to share shortly, I hope you'll give it a shot once the changes are ready to go live!

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description: Controls are terrible. Dang near impossible to hit buttons on the mower because of poor placement. Motion sickness is unbearable. Had such high hopes but can’t imagine they tested this game with users before launching it. Loved the power washing game but if I could have gotten a refund on this I would. Until they fix the terrible gameplay this game is a one star. Hope they improve it because it has potential buts not even close to ready for prime time.

reviews.review_title: Needs work in my honest opinion.
reviews.review_description: I was exited waiting for this app, but have been left disappointed. Many items are out of reach where they are impossible or very difficult to grab.  I had to kneel on my floor in order to remove the batteries from the mower. At 68, kneeling is a risky task.

developer_response.body:
Hi FancySchmancyTool,

Thank you for taking the time to review our game, and for sharing this feedback with us.

Would you be able to share your Lawn Mowing Simulator VR settings with us? We might be able to provide setting suggestions that improve your time with reaching objects.

We want to make sure we’re doing all that we can to provide you with a safe and comfortable experience.

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager

reviews.review_description: I guess you know what my review is about from the title, mr developer. I was so sick from your game. I did everything right and had a few turns with the lawnmower. Oh my god I was so sick. I passed out on my bed and was still sick the next day with an eye headache. I’m sure you know what to do, fix the frame rate! You even have a known YouTuber who plays vr saying that he’s no longer playing it due to the vr sickness.. Fix it or I can’t play it anymore. I was so looking forward to this game. What a shame.

developer_response.body:
Hi Albert,

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review! And I’m very sorry that you experienced motion sickness playing our game.

We’ve just pushed an update live that we hope will address this, with the addition of several new comfort settings. You’re now able to select from a variety of different vignette options and disable grass sway. We’ve also improved our centre dot feature. Together, these should work to improve the experience of those encountering motion sickness. 

I’m unsure if frame rate issues are a known problem to the team – however, I do know that ahead of launch, we shared a build with a selection of creators. Unfortunately, there was an issue that was identified in this build that the team worked diligently to fix ahead of launch last Thursday. If you’re experiencing a problem with your frame rate, it could be tied to an issue that we thought had already been resolved. Please report this issue to our Discord so that we can support you as quickly as possible!

If you have a moment, we’d appreciate you sharing your thoughts with us on this update.

You can read more about the update in our blog post:
https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/335328362384637/

And you can report bugs at this link below: https://discord.gg/lawnmowingsim

-Bradley
Curve Games Community Manager
